meta.notes: Fresh Codex benchmark run against the local social-posting skill using API credentials sourced from ~/keys/.env. No install step and no asset acquisition step were required because this is a pure LLM caption-generation skill. All four test cases were timed separately from the shell, and internal LLM timings were taken from the script's stderr markers. T4 attempted Instagram variations=3, but the variations call returned malformed JSON and the skill fell back to a single-caption generation path.

test_input.name: pasta-tutorial-brief
test_input.description: video tutorial: how to cook perfect pasta at home — tested 5 different techniques

task.name: social-posting
task.purpose: Benchmark the local social-posting skill across standard caption-generation scenarios for X, Instagram, and TikTok using a single cooking tutorial content brief.
task.expected_output: JSON output containing caption, hashtags, full_post, and recommended_post_time for each test case; T4 requests three Instagram variations.

install.notes: Not applicable. The skill was already present locally at ~/Pikabot/nova3-agent-skills/social-posting/.

asset_acquisition.notes: Not applicable. This benchmark uses a text content brief only; no media download or preprocessing step was required.

steps.name: t1_x_casual
steps.notes: llm_s=7.6 caption_len=226 hashtags_count=2 full_post_len=242 preview=tested 5 pasta techniques so you don't have to. salting the water less is actually fine.

steps.name: t2_instagram_casual
steps.notes: llm_s=16.2 caption_len=980 hashtags_count=25 recommended_windows=2 preview=I was wrong about cooking pasta until I actually tested every method back to back

steps.name: t3_tiktok_funny
steps.notes: llm_s=6.8 caption_len=69 hashtags_count=4 preview=I tested 5 pasta techniques so you don't have to (one made me cry fr)

execution.notes: Execution totals come from four separate shell-timed runs of generate_caption.py. T1-T3 each completed in a single Anthropic-backed call. T4 first attempted multi-variation generation, logged a malformed JSON array warning, then retried through the single-result path and returned one Instagram caption instead of three variations.

delivery.notes: Local delivery only; benchmark artifacts were written directly into the runs directory and no upload step was performed.

tokens._note: Nulled: extract-codex-tokens.py reported session-cumulative totals, not per-task usage. All 8 skills ran in a single Codex session with monotonically increasing token counts.

cost._note: Nulled: derived from unreliable session-cumulative token counts.
